Deliver seamless support with AI-powered help desk
LiveAgent combines an all-in-one 
customer service

No setup fee
24/7 Customer service
No credit card required

30-day free trial
Schedule a Demo
Try it Now
Partner with AI teammates to automate customer support
AI Chatbot
Resolves customer inquiries instantly, 24/7, in 100+ languages, lightening your teamâs workload. Built on autonomous AI 
agents
.

Free trial
Every channel. One inbox. No missed chats.
Email, live chat, phone, social media, WhatsApp, Viber, knowledge base â all unified in a single dashboard with 175+ features and 200+ integrations.
Get Started | 30 days free
Explore why LiveAgent is the best choice for your business
LiveAgent has been selected as the fastest implementation software, the best live chat software, and an industry leader by customers on prominent review portals.
Too many customer messages?
Powerful help desk software
Increase support team productivity by up to 20%. Manage email, chat, calls and social messages in one inbox.
Losing track of support requests?
Smart ticketing
Resolve up to 28% more requests on first contact. Automatically turn messages into tickets. Track and resolve every request easily.
Customers messaging you on social media?
Social media integrations
Respond to social messages up to 75% faster and organize your customer communication.
Visitors expect instant answers?
The fastest live chat
Increase conversions by up to 3Ã with live chat. Chat with visitors in real time and resolve questions faster.
Customers asking the same questions?
Knowledge base
Reduce support workload by up to 30%. Create help articles and FAQs so customers can find answers themselves.
Managing phone support separately?
Built-in call center
Achieve 90%+ 
customer satisfaction
. Handle calls directly from the helpdesk and track every conversation.
Make every conversation count.
Reach customers wherever they are with an omnichannel help desk and built-in call center.
Get Started | 30 days free
Take a tour

Explore real success stories from businesses that chose

 and dedicated communication platform.

llm_raw.description: An all-in-one omnichannel help desk platform featuring ticketing, live chat, call center capabilities, and built-in AI automation tools.
llm_raw.notes: LiveAgent provides a well-documented public REST API for developers to manage tickets, contacts, and agents, making it highly suitable for agent tooling.
